DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JUAN GALICIA, PATRICIA GALICIA'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER COMPELLING DEFENDANT MARCO MONROY TO ATTEND AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION, AND FOR A MONETARY SANCTION. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION AT A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DATE AND TIME (AND FORMAT, INCLUDING ZOOM) NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 21, 2020. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1285.00 SHALL BE PAID NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 21, 2020. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT REBECCA@GREYRESOLUTION.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA GREY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Plaintiff Juan Galicia, Patricia Galicia Notice Of Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant Marco Monroy To Attend And Testify At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Sep-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Andrew Westley, Esq. 415-362-2817 for Plaintiff.
Anna Monroy, wife of Defendant is present. Marco Monroy, Defendant in Pro Per is not present at the hearing.

THE PARTY STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Plaintiff informs the Court he did not receive any email contesting the tentative ruling and that Ms. Monroy cannot argue on behalf of Defendant Marco Monroy. The Court informs Ms. Monroy of the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Juan Galicia, Patricia Galicia's Motion For An Order Compelling Defendant Marco Monroy To Attend And Testify At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction.

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion to Compel attendance and testimony at deposition is GRANTED. Defendant shall appear for deposition at a mutually agreeable date and time (and format, including Zoom) no later than October 21, 2020. Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Sanctions is GRANTED. Sanctions in the amount of $1285.00 shall be paid no later than October 21, 2020.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at rebecca@greyresolution.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
